rationale: Plan v9 is implementation-ready and fully consistent with governing spec v2.6, the fail-closed/closed-set/spine-read-only/advisory-only trust model, and its own D1–D30 decisions plus exit criteria. Task sequencing (scaffold → isolated CI matrix with fetch-depth:0 → registries with real-git shallow proof → ledger integrity only with injected coverage → weavers with D17 inventory discipline and counted iterators → driver with D19/D26/D29 accounting gate, D20/D28 atomic no-replace publication, D21 physical containment, D23/D27/D30 bidirectional advisory scanners, then flagship + self-weave evidence) is executable AS-IS under one-task-per-PR discipline. No spine mutation, no reverse imports, no runtime deps, no partial artifacts, no inferred renames/confidence, no constructed loaders, and no inventory naming nonexistent files. Flagship (deriveExecutableRef eight-group exact match + review-set + coverage-unknown on skip) and reproduction evidence close the loop. Zero blocking defects or required textual changes; authorize Argo execution of this exact content-addressed plan.
